message:
✨ Add detect_drift tool for GitOps drift detection

Add a new MCP tool to detect configuration drift between Git repository
manifests and cluster state. This enables the KubeStellar Console's
GitOps page to show real drift status instead of relying on kubectl diff
fallback.

Features:
- Clone and parse YAML manifests from Git repositories
- Compare manifests against live cluster state
- Report missing, modified, and extra resources
- Support branch selection and namespace filtering
- Return both human-readable and JSON output for programmatic use

The implementation leverages the existing gitops package which already
had DriftDetector and ManifestReader implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
